verses.text: Ahab in Jezebel kiangah Elijah' hih khempeuh leh namsau tawh kamsangte khempeuh a thah khitna thu a gen hi
Tua ciangin Jezebel in Elijah kiangah kamtai khat sawlin, “Zing ciang tubang hunin amaute na thah bangin nangmah ka hong thah kei taak leh pasian-te in kei hong dawm kei ta hen,” cisak hi
Tua ciangin amah lau a, kithawi-in a suahtakna dingin paikhia a, Judah-te' khua Beersheba tungin tua lai-ah a nasempa nusia hi

Ahih hangin amahmah gamlakah ni khat lam pailai-in poding kung nuai khatah a tu hi. Tua ciangin amah in a sihna ding thu ngenin, “Phazo hi; tu-in Topa aw, ka nuntakna hong la ta in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka pate sangin kei ka hoihzaw kei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin poding kung khat nuai-ah amah lumsukin a ihmu hi. Tua laitakin vantung mi khat in amah lawngin ama kiangah, “Tho in la an ne in,” a ci hi
Amah khuadak a, ama lutang gei suang sa tungah a ki-em moh khat leh tui hai khat na om hi. Amah in tuate ne-in dawnin lumkik hi
Tua ciangin Topa' vantung mi a nihveina hong paikikin amah lawng a, “Tho in la an ne in; tua hi kei leh nang-a' dingin khualzinna haksa lua ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin amah tho a, an ne-in tui dawn a, tua an thahatna tawh Pasian' mual Horeb ciangdong sun sawmli leh zan sawmli sung a pai hi
Tua ciangin leihawm khatah amah tungin tua lai-ah giak hi. Topa in Elijah hopih a, “Elijah, hih lai-ah bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in, “Vanglian Pasian, Topa-a' dingin ka huaiham mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in na thuciamna nusia-in, na biakna taute lawnkhia uh a, namsau tawh na kamsangte that hi; kei, kei bekbek ka omlai hi. Amaute in kei nangawn thah dingin hong zong lai uh hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Paikhia in la, mualtung, Topa' mai-ah ding in,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in hong nawk a, a lian a khauh huihpi in mualte semkhamin Topa' mai-ah suangtumte sukham a, ahih hangin huihpi sungah Topa omlo hi. Huihpi nun' a daih khit ciangin zin ling a, ahih hangin zinling sungah Topa omlo hi
Zinling khit ciangin meikuang om a, ahih hangin meikuang sungah zong Topa omlo hi. Meikuang khit ciangin aw neem neu khat a ging hi
Elijah in a zak ciangin a puan tawh a mai tuamin paikhia a, leihawm lutna-ah ding hi. Ama kiangah aw khat hong ging a, “Elijah, hih lai-ah bang hih na hi hiam?” a ci hi

Amah in, “Vanglian Pasian, Topa-a' dingin ka huaiham mahmah hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Israel mite in na thuciamna nusia-in, na biakna taute lawnkhia uh a, namsau tawh na kamsangte that uh hi; kei, kei bekbek ka omlai hi. Amaute in kei nangawn thah dingin hong zong lai uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Pai in, Damaskas gamlak na lampi-ah ciahkik in. Na tun' ciangin Syria gam kumpi dingin Hazael sathau na nilh ding hi
Tua ciangin Israel kumpi dingin Nimshi' tapa Jehu sathau na nilh ding hi. Tua ciangin nangma mun-ah kamsang dingin Abelmeholah khuami Shafat' tapa Elisha sathau na nilh ding hi
Jehu in Hazael' namsau panin a suakta peuhpeuh that ding hi. Elisha in Jehu' namsau panin a suakta peuhpeuh that ding hi
Ahi zongin Baal mai-ah a kun nailo, amah a nam nailo mihing tul sagih Israel sungah ka sit ding hi,” a ci hi.

Tua ahih ciangin tua lai panin amah paikhia a, ama neihsa a bawngtal kap sawmlenih tawh lo a kho Shafat' tapa Elisha mu a, amah a sawmlenihna tawh a kho ahi hi. Elijah in ama gei nawkin ama tungah a puan lawn hi

Tua ciangin amah in a bawngtalte nusia-in Elijah' nungah tai a, “Ka nu leh ka pa kam vaikhakin hong namsak phot in; tua ciangin nang kong zui ding hi,” a ci hi. Amah in Elisha kiangah, “Paikik in; nang hong khaktan ka hi hiam?” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah a zuihna panin ciahkik a, a bawngtal kolte la-in a bawngtalte go a, a sate bawngtal kolte tawh huanin mite tungah pia a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Tua ciangin amah kithawi-in Elijah' nung zui a, ama na a sem hi.
